headline: Cognizant Tie Up Puts ServiceNow At Center Of AI Governance Story
summary: Cognizant is integrating its Neuro AI Trust platform with ServiceNow's AI Control Tower, creating a unified governance layer for enterprise AI. The partnership targets real time oversight, compliance automation, and incident response across the AI lifecycle within ServiceNow customer environments. The move is aimed at enterprises using AI in regulated and mission critical settings that require stronger assurance and risk controls. ServiceNow (NYSE:NOW) is tying this governance push to a...
